definitions.text: To present again or anew; to present by means of something standing in the place of; to exhibit the counterpart or image of; to typify.

examples: a landscape can be represented in a picture.
The sculptor represented a horse in bronze.

definitions.text: To portray by mimicry or acting; to act the part or character of
examples: It has always been his dream to represent Hamlet on Broadway.

definitions.text: To present again, for instance for medical attention.
To present again, possibly in an altered form.
examples: video game represented as live-action television
